clinical_history: Routine screening, patient age 52, no breast symptoms.
technique: Bilateral digital screening mammography with tomosynthesis; CC and MLO views.
comparison: Prior screening mammogram from 13 months ago, reviewed and compared. Stable in interval.
findings: Breast density: heterogeneously dense (ACR category C). Right breast: stable benign-appearing calcifications, no suspicious masses or architectural distortion. Left breast: 8 mm irregular mass in the upper-outer quadrant at 1 o'clock position, new compared to prior, with associated pleomorphic microcalcifications.
impression: Left upper-outer quadrant 8 mm irregular mass with pleomorphic microcalcifications, new compared to prior. BIRADS 4B (moderate suspicion). Recommend ultrasound-guided core biopsy.
